text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... The thing is, everyone in my dorm got
together last night and chatted away until really
late.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It was really fun. There were so many interesting
stories, I was on the edge of my seat the whole
time!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'd very much like to talk today as well, but... I
guess... I might be a teensy bit tired...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clearly sleep deprived, Fine Motion remains
drowsy all day.
